title: Metabolomics in endometriosis: challenges and perspectives for future studies.
author: Ortiz CN Torres-Reveron A Appleyard CB
content: S-EPMC8812441 PMC8812441 Metabolomics in endometriosis: challenges and perspectives for future studies. Endometriosis is a complex disease characterized by inflammation and the growth of endometrial- like glands and stroma outside the uterine cavity. The pathophysiology of endometriosis
